Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "FELIXINTHEFACTORY-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Felix in the Factory.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC title screen program loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the title screen program.
Also changed the POKE53265,PEEK(53265) AND 239 instruction on line 14 to be POKE53265,PEEK(53265) AND 255 instead so that the screen is not hidden whilst drawing the title screen. This avoids a long period without anything visibly happening on screen when the game starts.
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $A7AE after entering the RUN command when the first part of the game has loaded.
